description:
Modify the reference solar array design for Phoenix, AZ by updating the geographic location, setting the tilt to 33°, azimuth to 180°, changing the panel model to 'SunPower SPR-X21-345', and saving the new configuration. 

1. Energy3D is open with the 'solar-panel-tilt-angle.ng3' starter project.
2. Change the location to Phoenix, AZ.
3. Select the solar racks and set their Tilt angle to 33° and Azimuth to 180°.
4. Change the Solar Panel model to 'SunPower SPR-X21-345'.
5. Save the updated project as 'phoenix-solar-array.ng3' in the ~/Documents/Energy3D/ directory (do not overwrite the original file).
